source: Android BleAdvertisementContentTest characterization and iOS shared-shared manufacturer parser delegation

android.policy: ignore malformed GPB segment and clear HR presence

ios.policy: shared manufacturer parser ignores malformed GPB segment and clears HR presence when PolarBleSdkShared is linked

common.policy: reject or ignore malformed GPB segments deterministically without indexing beyond payload bounds

notes: This malformed Polar manufacturer payload contains the company id and one GPB marker byte but omits the GPB length byte.
